info.name: IMS - Internship Management System
info.description:
Complete API collection for IMS.

🔁 CORRECT TESTING FLOW:
1. Auth → Register & Verify all 4 users
2. Admin → Setup departments, approve industry
3. Industry → Create internship postings
4. Student → Browse hub, apply, submit logs
5. Industry → Review applicants, approve, evaluate
6. Supervisor → Review logs, site visits, final marking
7. Common Settings → Profile, password for all roles

⚙️ SETUP NOTES:
- Login requests auto-save JWT token to {{token}} variable
- IDs auto-save via test scripts for request chaining
- Always run Login for the correct role BEFORE testing that role's APIs

item.name: 1. 🔐 Auth — Register & Verify
item.description:
STEP 1: Register all 4 users → Verify OTP for each → Login to get tokens.

⚠️ After each Register, check your email for OTP, then call Verify OTP with that code.

exec: // Admin auto-activates (status: active), but still needs OTP for email verification

item.name: 2. 🔑 Auth — Password Management
item.description: Test forgot password, reset OTP, reset password, and authenticated password update.

item.name: 3. 🛡️ Admin — Platform Setup
item.description:
STEP 2: Login as Admin first (1.9).
Admin sets up departments and verifies industry partners BEFORE they can post.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Computer Science",
    "code": "CS",
    "description": "Department of Computer Science & Information Technology",
    "head": "Dr. Nasir Ahmed",
    "status": "active"
}

item.name: 4. 🏢 Industry — Create Postings
item.description:
STEP 3: Login as Industry first (1.10).
Industry creates internship postings so students can apply.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Full Stack Developer Intern",
    "description": "Join our engineering team to build scalable web applications using MERN stack. You will work on real client projects and gain experience with CI/CD pipelines.",
    "location": "Lahore, Pakistan",
    "type": "Full-time",
    "duration": "3 Months",
    "stipend": "PKR 50,000/month",
    "tags": ["React", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Express"],
    "skillsRequired": ["JavaScript", "React.js", "Node.js", "REST APIs", "Git"],
    "deadline": "2026-04-30",
    "status": "open",
    "category": "Web Dev"
}

item.name: 5. 🎓 Student — Browse & Apply
item.description:
STEP 4: Login as Student first (1.12).
Student browses the hub, applies to internship created in Step 3, uploads CV, submits logs.

item.name: 6. 🏢 Industry — Review & Manage
item.description:
STEP 5: Login as Industry (1.10).
Industry reviews applicants, approves the student, manages interns, and submits evaluations.

item.name: 7. 📝 Student — Submit Logs
item.description:
STEP 6: Login as Student (1.12).
After being approved by industry, student submits weekly logs.

item.name: 8. 👨‍🏫 Supervisor — Review & Mark
item.description:
STEP 7: Login as Supervisor (1.11).
Supervisor reviews student logs, schedules site visits, and does final marking.

body.raw:
{
    "student": "{{studentId}}",
    "company": "TechFlow Solutions",
    "address": "Office #402, IT Tower, Lahore",
    "date": "2026-03-20",
    "time": "10:00 AM",
    "contactPerson": "Ahmed Ali (HR Manager)",
    "status": "upcoming"
}

item.name: 9. 📊 Admin — Reports & Cleanup
item.description:
STEP 8: Login as Admin (1.9).
Admin views global reports after full cycle, manages cleanup.

item.name: 10. ⚙️ Common User Settings
item.description:
Works for ANY authenticated role. Change {{token}} to the role you want to test.
Tests: Get profile, update profile (with role-specific meta), deactivate.
